scripts.dev: DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-dev.db PORT=3001 concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-dev.db PORT=3001 drizzle-kit push && DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-dev.db PORT=3001 tsx watch server/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.start: DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-prod.db drizzle-kit push && DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-prod.db NODE_ENV=production node dist/server/server/index.js
scripts.db:reset:dev: rm -f data/mandu-dev.db && DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-dev.db npm run db:push
scripts.db:reset:prod: rm -f data/mandu-prod.db && DATABASE_PATH=./data/mandu-prod.db npm run db:push
